stemHtml: A multi-engine jet aircraft with fewer than 9 passenger seats and an MTOM below 5700 kg falls into which performance class?

options.a: Performance class A, because all multi-engine jet aircraft belong to this class.
options.c: Performance class C, as a special category for jets with fewer than 9 seats.
options.d: Performance class B, due to its seating capacity below 9 and MTOM below 5700 kg.
